schemes.benefit_en: Rs 5 lakh (women: Rs 10 lakh)/year free health cover for BPL families

schemes.benefit_en: Rs 10,000/year (Rs 50,000 over 5 years) for Odisha women
schemes.eligibility: Odisha women aged 21-60, not income tax payer
